Definition: The country (IHR Member State) that completed the costed NAPHS
The JEE pillar to which the capacity, requirement, activity, and cost correspond
A standardized (or "mapped") core capacity specified by the research team to align results across different JEE versions with different capacities
The capacity of the JEE to which the cost corresponds (e.g., "P.8 Immunization") as specified in the published costing document (from various JEE documents)
Allowable values: Any core capacity from any JEE

Definition: The real-world requirement that the cost is intended to support (e.g., "Strengthen the implementation of national immunization plans to improve coverage")
The costed action or activity, described at the most granular level available in the costed NAPHS
The implementation year that the cost is budgeted to occur during (e.g., "1")
The calendar year that the cost is budgeted to occur during (e.g., "2019")
The yearly cost for the activity reported on the costed NAPHS (e.g,, "1000000")
The currency that the cost is reported in in the costed NAPHS, including the year (e.g., "USD (2019)")
Flags with relevant notes about a given data point, e.g., that it was noted as "no cost" or that numbers don't sum to totals as reported in PDF documents
